subcodes.first_line: O lions of the thicket of Divine Unity! The Sun of the heaven of the Glorious Lord and the Single Light hath shed its radiance upon the horizons of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شیران بیشه توحید خورشید آسمان رب مجید و نور وحید از افق عالم بپرتوی جهان
subcodes.subjects: @Declaration of Baha'u'llah, @chastisement and requital, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
